title: carex binervis var. ovata
intro: Carex binervis var. ovata, also known as Two-veined Sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. Carex binervis var. ovata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
